name: Lydian International Limited
summary: Lydian International Limited, together with its subsidiaries, explores for and develops gold properties in the Caucasus region. The company focuses on its 100% owned Amulsar gold project that covers an area of 113 square kilometers located in south-central Armenia. It also explores for silver. The company was formerly known as Lydian Resource Company Limited and changed its name to Lydian International Limited in December 2007. Lydian International Limited was founded in 2005 and is based in Saint Helier, Jersey.
